'''Skent Graff''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] who served during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Biography==
A broad shouldered male with handsome features who was proud of his [[Human/Legends|Human]] heritage, Graff's father had served aboard ''[[Corbantis]]'' during [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad's]] bid for galactic power before dying of the [[Death Seed]] plague.

In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Graff commanded the cruiser ''[[Soothfast]]'' on patrol duty in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]]. ''Soothfast''{{'s}} victory against a pair of Yuuzhan Vong warships enabled the delivery of [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]] into [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] hands.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
